transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation. This is Ava, how can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, my doctor said I need a referral to a cardiologist, but I don't know how to get one.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can help with that. Can I get your name and date of birth to pull up your file?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Daniel Whitfield, born March 4th, 1972.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Daniel. I see Dr. Kessler's office requested a referral for you to Dr. Priya Anand, cardiology, dated yesterday.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good, so is it already approved?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, it's approved under your Sunstone Gold plan. You can schedule directly with Dr. Anand's office now.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Do I need to bring anything to that appointment?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just your insurance card and the referral number, which is R-4482. I can text it to you.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: That would be great, thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sending it now. Anything else I can help with?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's everything. Thanks so much.
